profile.name: Xiao Xie
profile.affiliation: Department of Sports Science, Zhejiang University
profile.summary: I work on data visualization and human-computer interaction, with a current focus on the visual analytics of sports data.
bio: My research interests are Data Visualization and Human-computer interaction, with a focus on the visual analytics of sports data. Currently, I am a tenure-track assistant professor at the Department of Sports Science, Zhejiang University.

I received my Ph.D. in Computer Science from Zhejiang University in 2020, where I worked with Prof. Yingcai Wu and the Interactive Data Group. Prior to that, I received my B.S. in Software Engineering from Sun Yat-sen University in 2015.
